root.update_contents: <FlowDocument FontFamily="Microsoft YaHei UI" FontSize="14" LineHeight="14" PagePadding="5,0,5,0" AllowDrop="False" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">【版本1.1.2修复】</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 软件开机自启动时无法正确加载数据库和密钥。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">【版本1.1.1修复】</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 前端：ShareView导航异常。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">2. 前端：离线状态下Fluent图标显示异常。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="9.333333333333334"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">【版本1.1.0更新】</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 重构前端页面，支持图标、列表两种显示模式，优化了图片预览功能。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">2. 重构后端服务器，所有页面在同一窗口内显示，不再创建新的窗口。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">3. 新增支持分享文件夹、自动检查更新、上传时指定保存路径等，删除了多语言支持。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">4. 更多更新欢迎下载体验。</Run></Paragraph></FlowDocument>
